languages.text: {n}Эоганн осматривает обрубок мехадендрита.{/n} "Он опасен. Риск повторения подобной ситуации высок. Я бы рекомендовал похоронить его здесь. Но если вы решите иначе я думаю, что, изучив его свойства, смогу разработать оружие на их основе. Я доверюсь вашему выбору".

{n}Eogunn examines the stump of his mechadendrite.{/n} "It is dangerous. The risk of a similar situation happening again is high. I suggest we bury it here. But if you decide otherwise, I believe I could study its properties and develop a weapon based on it. I will trust your decision."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн осматривает обрубок мехадендрита.{/n} "Он опасен. Риск повторения подобной ситуации высок. Я бы рекомендовал похоронить его здесь. Но если вы решите иначе я думаю, что, изучив его свойства, смогу разработать оружие на их основе. Я доверюсь вашему выбору".

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn examines the stump of his mechadendrite.{/n} "It is dangerous. The risk of a similar situation happening again is high. I suggest we bury it here. But if you decide otherwise, I believe I could study its properties and develop a weapon based on it. I will trust your decision."

{n}Eogunn examines the stump of his mechadendrite.{/n} "It is dangerous. The risk of a similar situation happening again is high. I suggest we bury it here. But if you decide otherwise, I believe I could study its properties and develop a weapon based on it. I will trust your decision."

{n}Eogunn examines the stump of his mechadendrite.{/n} "It is dangerous. The risk of a similar situation happening again is high. I suggest we bury it here. But if you decide otherwise, I believe I could study its properties and develop a weapon based on it. I will trust your decision."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn examina el muñón de su mecadendrita.{/n} «Es peligroso. Existe un riesgo considerable de que la situación se repita. Yo recomiendo que lo enterremos aquí. Pero si opta por quedárselo, creo que podría estudiar sus propiedades y desarrollar un arma basada en su diseño. Confío en su criterio».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn examines the stump of his mechadendrite.{/n} "It is dangerous. The risk of a similar situation happening again is high. I suggest we bury it here. But if you decide otherwise, I believe I could study its properties and develop a weapon based on it. I will trust your decision."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn examina el muñón de su mecadendrita.{/n} «Es peligroso. Existe un riesgo considerable de que la situación se repita. Yo recomiendo que lo enterremos aquí. Pero si opta por quedárselo, creo que podría estudiar sus propiedades y desarrollar un arma basada en su diseño. Confío en su criterio».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡检视着机械触须的断茬。{/n}“这东西很危险。类似的情况很可能再次发生。我建议把它埋在这里。但如果您另有打算，我也可以研究它的特性，并以此开发一种武器。我会遵从您的选择。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn examines the stump of his mechadendrite.{/n} "It is dangerous. The risk of a similar situation happening again is high. I suggest we bury it here. But if you decide otherwise, I believe I could study its properties and develop a weapon based on it. I will trust your decision."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡检视着机械触须的断茬。{/n}“这东西很危险。类似的情况很可能再次发生。我建议把它埋在这里。但如果您另有打算，我也可以研究它的特性，并以此开发一种武器。我会遵从您的选择。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn examine sa mécadendrite tranchée.{/n} « Il est dangereux et nous ne devons pas sous-estimer le risque qu'un incident similaire se produise. Je suggère que nous l'enterrions ici, mais si vous vous y opposez, je devrais pouvoir étudier ses propriétés et m'en servir pour mettre au point une arme. Je m'en remets à votre décision. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn examines the stump of his mechadendrite.{/n} "It is dangerous. The risk of a similar situation happening again is high. I suggest we bury it here. But if you decide otherwise, I believe I could study its properties and develop a weapon based on it. I will trust your decision."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn examine sa mécadendrite tranchée.{/n} « Il est dangereux et nous ne devons pas sous-estimer le risque qu'un incident similaire se produise. Je suggère que nous l'enterrions ici, mais si vous vous y opposez, je devrais pouvoir étudier ses propriétés et m'en servir pour mettre au point une arme. Je m'en remets à votre décision. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, mekadentritinin güdük kısmını inceliyor.{/n} "Tehlikeli. Benzer bir durumun tekrar yaşanma riski yüksek. Onu buraya gömmemizi öneririm. Ancak aksine karar verirseniz özelliklerini inceleyip ona dayalı bir silah geliştirebileceğime inanıyorum. Kararınıza güveneceğim."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn examines the stump of his mechadendrite.{/n} "It is dangerous. The risk of a similar situation happening again is high. I suggest we bury it here. But if you decide otherwise, I believe I could study its properties and develop a weapon based on it. I will trust your decision."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn, mekadentritinin güdük kısmını inceliyor.{/n} "Tehlikeli. Benzer bir durumun tekrar yaşanma riski yüksek. Onu buraya gömmemizi öneririm. Ancak aksine karar verirseniz özelliklerini inceleyip ona dayalı bir silah geliştirebileceğime inanıyorum. Kararınıza güveneceğim."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn begutachtet den Stumpf seines Mechadendriten.{/n} "Es ist gefährlich. Die Gefahr, dass sich eine ähnliche Situation wiederholt, ist groß. Wir sollten es hier begraben. Aber falls Ihr Euch anders entscheidet, könnte ich es wohl studieren, um eine Waffe daraus zu entwickeln. Die Entscheidung liegt bei Euch."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn examines the stump of his mechadendrite.{/n} "It is dangerous. The risk of a similar situation happening again is high. I suggest we bury it here. But if you decide otherwise, I believe I could study its properties and develop a weapon based on it. I will trust your decision."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn begutachtet den Stumpf seines Mechadendriten.{/n} "Es ist gefährlich. Die Gefahr, dass sich eine ähnliche Situation wiederholt, ist groß. Wir sollten es hier begraben. Aber falls Ihr Euch anders entscheidet, könnte ich es wohl studieren, um eine Waffe daraus zu entwickeln. Die Entscheidung liegt bei Euch."

languages.text: {n}エオガンは自らの機械触手の切り株を検める。{/n}「これは危険です。同様の事態が再び起こる危険は高い。ここに埋めることを提案します。しかし、あなたが別の判断を下すのであれば、私はその特性を研究し、それを基にした兵器を開発できると考えます。あなたの決定を信じましょう」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn examines the stump of his mechadendrite.{/n} "It is dangerous. The risk of a similar situation happening again is high. I suggest we bury it here. But if you decide otherwise, I believe I could study its properties and develop a weapon based on it. I will trust your decision."
